data.body:
## TDD Requirement

Write failing tests (RED state) that assert v2 code is absent from 6 scripts that were missed in the original implementation plan:

1. issue-quality-check.sh — uses $TK variable to load tickets
2. check-acceptance-criteria.sh — uses $TK variable to load tickets
3. issue-summary.sh — uses $TK variable for ticket lookups
4. issue-batch.sh — uses $TK variable for batch operations
5. release-debug-lock.sh — uses $TK variable
6. qualify-ticket-refs.sh — uses $TK variable

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh with test functions asserting grep for TK= and 'tk ' patterns returns non-zero in each script
2. Verify all tests FAIL on current codebase (RED state)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh
- [ ] Tests FAIL on current codebase (RED state)
  Verify: { bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0; }

## Files Modified
- tests/scripts/test-utility-scripts-v2-removal.sh (Create)
